name: devops-core
description: Interactive, safety-first skills for updating Kubernetes clusters (EKS and AKS).

interface.shortDescription: Kubernetes cluster update skills with MCP tools
interface.longDescription: Safety-first skills for updating AWS EKS and Azure AKS clusters. Includes prerequisite verification, Terraform scanning, add-on inventory, Helm release management, changelog research for breaking changes, and guided one-at-a-time upgrades.
